summary: A black hatchback approaches from the left side of the highway and crashes into the median barrier, causing debris to scatter across the roadway.

events_timeline.event: A black hatchback approaches from the left side of the highway and crashes into the median barrier, scattering debris across the roadway.

uncertainties: The identity of the median barrier is unclear.
Some debris scattered across the roadway may be attributed to the crash.

risk_assessment.why: The hatchback crashes into the median barrier, resulting in debris scattering across the roadway. This indicates a collision that poses a significant risk to other vehicles and pedestrians.
